responsibilities: List all CLI entry points for the ArchSpine system
List all MCP entry points for the ArchSpine system
List all exported modules available to consumers
Provide a machine- and human-readable reference of the system's public surface
outOfScope: Detailed usage examples beyond listing entry points

English.purpose: This document provides a generated map of all public-facing entry points for the ArchSpine system, including CLI commands, MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoints, and exported modules.
English.context_and_audience: It is intended for developers and AI agents who need to understand the available interfaces for interacting with the system. The map is automatically generated and should be kept in sync via `spine sync`. The document acts as a single source of truth for discovering how to invoke commands, connect MCP tools, or import modules.
key_takeaways: The document is generated and must be refreshed manually (e.g., `spine sync`) to stay up to date.
It covers three categories of public surface: CLI, MCP, and module exports.
It is an experimental view intended to improve discoverability and maintainability of ArchSpine's public API.
